rationale: The "POV rushing home to play" hook skews young/male and is built around a Tetris-style block puzzle, which clashes with Marble Sort!'s 25-55 female casual audience and its physics/color-sorting loop — a relaxing-satisfaction angle won't read the same when the protagonist is a hyped young guy. Palette is also off (saturated purple/yellow vs. soft lavender pastels), and the archetype has thin signal (1 creative, 1 advertiser) so it's a weak bet. Skip unless reworked into a calmer, female-led ASMR/POV "unwind with Marble Sort" variant that showcases the actual sorting mechanic in the first 3 seconds.
